landRegistration.title: Create a new investment listing
landRegistration.subtitle: Add your agricultural land details, upload images, and publish it to the investor opportunities page.

details.title: Land details
details.p: These details will be shown to investors in the listing page.

placeholders.description: Describe the land, cultivation plan, accessibility, soil quality, irrigation, and why investors should fund it.

images.title: Images
images.p: Upload clear land images. These will be stored in Supabase Storage and saved in the database as listing assets.
images.label: Land photos

uploadEvidence.title: Upload Evidence
uploadEvidence.subtitle: Please upload all relevant supporting documents or images as evidence for your submission. Ensure that the files are clear, accurate, and directly related to the information provided. Accepted file formats may include images (JPG, PNG) or documents (PDF). Make sure each file is properly labeled and easy to understand before uploading.
uploadEvidence.formats: JPG, PNG, PDF formats, Max 5MB per file

financialReport.title: Farm Performance Overview
financialReport.subtitle: Monitor your total funding received and track agricultural yield over time.
financialReport.moneySubtitle: Total funding received across all your land listings, sourced from investment and ledger records.

projectBreakdown.title: Per-Project Funding Breakdown
projectBreakdown.empty: No project funding data available yet.

yieldTracking.title: 🌾 Yield Tracking
yieldTracking.subtitle: Record your harvest yields to track agricultural performance over time.
yieldTracking.noHistory: No yield records yet. Submit your first harvest above.

contracts.title: My Contracts
contracts.subtitle: You can view the investment contracts received for your land here.
contracts.trustDesc1: Every contract between you and the investor is permanently recorded using
contracts.trustDesc2: . No one can alter, cancel, or remove these contracts. Your rights are fully protected.
contracts.emptyDesc: When investors fund your land, the contracts will appear here.

explanation.title: 🌿 About the Contract
explanation.p1Start: This contract between you and the investor
explanation.p1Mid1: is permanently recorded on the international Blockchain system. The CHC (Ceylon Harvest Capital) platform releases your payments via a
explanation.p1End: . As you complete each milestone, the funds are automatically granted to you.
explanation.p2End: monitor this agreement. No one can alter or remove your contract.

contracts.footer: If you have any issues regarding your contracts, please contact the CHC team via "24/7 Support".

farmerDashboard.title: Welcome back, {{- name}}
farmerDashboard.subtitle: Manage your land listings, monitor project funding, and track your farm application progress.

investments.title: ⛓️ Investments on my lands
investments.subtitle: Each investment below is permanently recorded on the Polygon blockchain. Click "View on PolygonScan" to verify the on-chain record independently.

emptyState.title: No investments yet
emptyState.desc: When investors fund your land listings, their investments will appear here with blockchain proof.

lands.title: My land listings
lands.subtitle: Listings created here are shown to investors on the opportunities page when they are active.

emptyState.title: No land listings yet
emptyState.desc: Create your first listing to make your land visible to investors.

applicationDetails.title: Farm application details
applicationDetails.subtitle: Your verified farmer profile and registration details.

milestones.title: Milestone updates
milestones.subtitle: Approved and rejected milestone decisions are shown here.

emptyState.title: No milestone updates yet
emptyState.desc: Submit milestone progress to see auditor decisions here.

fundedProjects.title: Funded projects
fundedProjects.subtitle: Projects currently connected to your farmer account.

emptyState.title: No projects yet
emptyState.desc: Your dashboard is connected. Projects will appear here once investors fund your farm.
